listings.deposit: A deposit of $20,000.00 or 10% of the sales price, whichever is lower, cash or certified check will be
listings.notice_text: Foreclosure Sale TRUSTEE SALE 165 Southampton Dr, Harrisonburg, VA 22801 Rockingham County In execution of a Deed of Trust in the original principal amount of $186,150.00, dated March 19, 2019 recorded in the Clerk's Office of the Circuit Court of the Rockingham County, Virginia, in Document No. 2019-09262, in Book No. 5105, at Page 592, at the request of the holder of the Note, the undersigned Substitute Trustee and will offer for sale at public auction at the entrance to the Circuit Court of Rockingham County, 80 Court Square, Harrisonburg, on June 9, 2026 at 10:15 AM the property described in said deed, located at the above address and briefly described as: Lot 9, Block 2, Southampton Subdivision, Section 4, with any improvements thereon Subject to any and all covenants, conditions, restrictions, easements, and all other matters of record taking priority over the Deed of Trust, if any, affecting the aforesaid property. TERMS OF SALE: CASH: A deposit of $20,000.00 or 10% of the sales price, whichever is lower, cash or certified check will be required at the time of sale, but no more than $9,000.00 of cash will be accepted, with settlement within fifteen (15) days from the date of sale. Sale is subject to post sale confirmation that the borrower did not file for protection under the U.S. Bankruptcy Code prior to the sale which affects the validity of the sale, as well as to post-sale confirmation of the status of the loan with the loan servicer including, but not limited to, determination of whether the borrower entered into any repayment agreement, reinstated or paid off the loan prior to the sale. Sale is also subject to buyer providing Trustee with information needed for reporting requirements required by Federal Law including FinCen requirements (31 CFR Chapter X) within 15 days from date of sale. In any such event, the sale shall be null and void, and the Purchaser’s sole remedy, in law or equity, shall be the return of his deposit without interest. Additional terms may be announced at the time of sale. Pursuant to the Federal Fair Debt Collection Practices Act, we advise you that this firm is a debt collector attempting to collect the indebtedness referred to herein and any information we obtain will be used for that purpose. SAMUEL I. WHITE, P.C., Substitute Trustee This is a communication from a debt collector. FOR INFORMATION CONTACT: SAMUEL I. WHITE, P.C. (94017) 448 Viking Drive Suite 350 Virginia Beach, VA 23452 757-457-1460 - Call Between 9:00 a.m. and 5:00 p.m. or visit our website at www.siwpc.net To: The Daily News Record 5/4, 5/11 ROCKINGHAM COUNTY, VIRGINIA 2026-05-11

listings.address: 3.939 Acres of Unimproved Real Estate Located on Limestone Lane, Dayton, VA 22821
listings.notice_text: Foreclosure Sale TRUSTEE'S SALE OF 3.939 Acres of Unimproved Real Estate Located on Limestone Lane, Dayton, VA 22821 In execution of a certain Deed of Trust dated September 22, 2021, recorded in the land records of the Clerk’s Office of the Circuit Court of Rockingham County, Virginia in Deed Book 5481, Page 629, the undersigned Substitute Trustee will offer the following real estate for sale at public auction. TAX MAP NO. 122-(A)-130A: PARCEL ID NO. R48704: That certain lot or parcel of land containing an aggregate of 3.939 acres, more or less, situate on the south side of Limestone Lane (State Route 737), located in Ashby District, Rockingham County, Virginia, being the total of a parcel containing 1.504 acres as shown on a plat entitled "DIVISION OF JAMES H. BARNHART LAND" prepared by Robert L Shiflet, L. S., attached to and recorded with a deed dated August 29, 2008, duly recorded in the Clerk's Office of the Circuit Court of Rockingham County, Virginia, in Deed Book 3400, Page 446, and an adjacent transfer of 2.435 acres shown as Parcel 3 on a plat entitled 'DIVISION OF JAMES H. BARNHART LAND" dated November 24, 2020, prepared by Robert L. Shiflet, L.S., attached to and recorded with a deed dated December 2, 2020, recorded in the aforesaid Clerk's Office aforesaid in Deed Book 5382, Page 99. The above-listed property having been acquired by Deed of Gift dated October 16, 2015, recorded in the aforesaid Clerk's Office in Deed Book 4639 page 56. The sale shall take place on Wednesday May 6, 2026, at the time of 11:00 a.m. or as soon as practicable thereafter, on the steps of the Rockingham County Court House, located at 80 Court Square, Harrisonburg, Virginia. Terms of Sale: A $10,000.00 Cashier’s Check made payable to Clark & Bradshaw, P.C. Substitute Trustee is required as a deposit on the day of sale, and balance in cash within thirty (30) days or upon delivery of deed to purchaser(s) or soon therein after as Trustee can convey marketable title. The deposit shall be applied to the purchase price at settlement; or in the event of buyer’s failure to complete settlement within thirty (30) days after Trustee can convey marketable title, the deposit shall be forfeited and applied to the costs of the sale and the properties shall be resold at the cost and expense of the defaulting bidder. All references to property are for identification purposes only. Trustee makes no representation or warranty regarding improvements on lot, or parcel of land purchased. The property shall be conveyed without representation or warranty of any kind, in "AS-IS" condition. The above listed property may be subject to fees, easements, conditions, restrictions, and reservations contained in duly recorded deeds, plats and other instruments constituting constructive notice in the chain of title, which have not expired by limitation of time, contained therein, or otherwise become ineffective. Real Estate taxes will be prorated as of the day of sale. For More Information Contact: Clark & Bradshaw, P.C. Cheryl A. Payne Substitute Trustee Real Estate Paralegal Clark & Bradshaw, P.C.OR Clark & Bradshaw, P.C. 92 North Liberty Street 92 North Liberty Street Harrisonburg, VA 22801 Harrisonburg, VA 22801 Telephone Number: (540) 433-2601 Telephone Number: Phone:(540) 433-2601 4/22, 4/29 ROCKINGHAM COUNTY, VIRGINIA 2026-04-29

Foreclosure Sale TRUSTEE’S SALE OF 194 THOMPSON DRIVE, STANLEY, VA 22851. In execution of a certain Deed of Trust dated January 25, 2006, in the original principal amount of $135,000.00 recorded in the Clerk’s Office, Circuit Court for Page County, Virginia as Instrument No. 060001592. The undersigned Substitute Trustee will offer for sale at public auction in the front of the Circuit Court building for Page County, 116 Court Street, Luray, Virginia, or any such temporary alternative Circuit Court location designated by the Judges of the Circuit Court, on May 22, 2026, at 10:15 AM, the property described in said Deed of Trust, located at the above address, and more particularly described as follows: ALL THAT CERTAIN LOT OR PARCEL OF LAND WITH ALL IMRPOVEMENTS THEREON AND ALL RIGHTS, EASEMENTS AND APPURTENANCES THEREUNTO BELONGING, LYING AND BEING SITUATE IN PINE GROVE HOLLOWS IN MARKSVILLE MAGISTERIAL DISTRICT OF PAGE COUNTY, VIRGINIA, AND MORE PARTICULARLY BOUNDED AND DESCRIBED AS FOLLOWS, TO-WIT: "BEGINNING AT A POINT 233 FEET NORTH OF THE SOUTHERN PROPERTY LINE OF THE PAUL N. THOMPSON PROPERTY AND ON THE WESTERN BOUNDARY OF THE SAID PROPERTY, THENCE RUNNING IN A NORTHERLY DIRECTION AND ALONG THE WESTERN PROPERTY LINE OF PAUL N. THOMPSON A DISTANCE OF 60 FEET MORE OR LESS TO AN IRON PIN; THENCE IN A EASTERLY DIRECTION A DISTANCE OF 55 FEET MORE OR LESS TO AN IRON PIN; THENCE IN A SOUTHERLY DIRECTION A DISTANCE OF 60 FEET MORE OR LESS TO AN IRON PIN; THENCE RUNNING IN A WESTERLY DIRECTION A DISTANCE OF 55 FEET MORE OR LESS TO THE POINT OF BEGINNING", CONTAINING 3,300 SQUARE FEET. TERMS OF SALE: ALL CASH. A bidder’s deposit of ten percent (10%) of the sale price or ten percent (10%) of the original principal balance of the subject Deed of Trust, whichever is lower, in the form of cash or certified funds payable to the Substitute Trustee must be present at the time of the sale. The balance of the purchase price will be due within fifteen (15) days of sale, otherwise Purchaser’s deposit may be forfeited to Trustee. Time is of the essence. If the sale is set aside for any reason, the Purchaser at the sale shall be entitled to a return of the deposit paid. The Purchaser may, if provided by the terms of the Trustee’s Memorandum of Foreclosure Sale, be entitled to a $50 cancellation fee from the Substitute Trustee, but shall have no further recourse against the Mortgagor, the Mortgagee or the Mortgagee’s attorney. A form copy of the Trustee’s memorandum of foreclosure sale and contract to purchase real property is available for viewing at www.aldridgepite.com. Additional terms, if any, to be announced at the sale and the Purchaser may be given the option to execute the contract of sale electronically. This is a communication from a debt collector and any information obtained will be used for that purpose. The sale is subject to seller confirmation. Substitute Trustee: Equity Trustees, LLC, 8100 Three Chopt Road, Suite 240, Richmond, VA 23229. If you have any questions or concerns, please contact the Virginia Pre-Sale Department of counsel for Equity Trustees, LLC at 301-961-6555, website: www.aldridgepite.com. VA-371749-1. 3/19, 3/26, 4/23 ROCKINGHAM COUNTY, VIRGINIA 2026-04-23

Foreclosure Sale TRUSTEE'S SALE OF TIME-SHARE ESTATES A number of Time-Share estates in Time-Share units at Massanutten Village near McGaheysville, Rockingham County, Virginia shall be offered for sale in execution of the designated Memoranda of Delinquent Assessments and/or Fees affecting the Owners and time-shares indicated and more fully described at the web address of www.candbsaleads.com, and of record in the Clerk's Office of the Circuit Court of Rockingham County, Virginia. The undersigned Trustee will offer for sale at public auction in the lobby of the Administrative Office Building of Massanutten Village, 4047 Massanutten Drive, near McGaheysville, Virginia: (a) Time-Share Estates as specified and defined in the Time-Share Instrument for Eagle Trace Estates at Massanutten, a Time-Share, dated December 15, 1989, and recorded in the aforesaid Clerk's Office in Deed Book 993, at Page 16, as amended, and subject to the covenants, restrictions, and easements as set forth in said "Instrument”; and (b) Time-Share Estates as specified and defined in the Time-Share Instrument for Woodstone at Massanutten, a Time-Share Project, dated April 29, 1999, and recorded in the aforesaid Clerk's Office in Deed Book 1725, at Page 502, as amended, and subject to the covenants, restrictions, and easements as set forth in said "Instrument”; on WEDNESDAY, APRIL 22, 2026, BEGINNING AT 12:30 P.M. and continuing until all Time-Share Estates are sold as more fully described on the website at www.candbsaleads.com. NAME OF ASSOCIATION: Eagle Trace Owners Association, Woodstone Timeshare Owners Association GENERAL LOCATION OF THE TIME-SHARE PROJECT: Massanutten Resort located directly off Resort Drive (State Route 644) near McGaheysville, Virginia. TERMS OF SALE: 10% deposit on day of sale and balance in cash within thirty (30) days upon delivery of deed to purchaser. TRUSTEE: Clark & Bradshaw, P.C., 92 North Liberty Street, Harrisonburg, VA 22802, 540-433-2601 4/7, 4/13, 4/17, 4/21 ROCKINGHAM COUNTY, VIRGINIA 2026-04-21
